name: img-comparison-slider
when_to_use: 需要可触摸、可键盘操作且随容器缩放的 before/after 图片拖拽对照时用它而非手写,因为原生在双图裁剪同步、指针坐标和移动端手势上失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能写一个脆弱的 range+clip-path demo,做不到 resize、触摸方向判定、键盘可达与同一分割位置的稳定同步;该组件原生闭合这些状态。

data_in.note: 两张图片分别进入 custom element 的 first/second 命名 slot;boot 用 JS createElement 挂载,不会写声明式自定义标签。

before.src: string —— 第一张图片 URL 或 data URL

after.src: string —— 第二张图片 URL 或 data URL

schema.position?: number,0..100 —— 分割线百分比,默认 50
schema.hover?: boolean —— 指针移动即跟随,默认 false

spec.note: 两张图必须共享同一明确像素高度才能保持裁剪几何一致;boot 默认 360px、宽度跟随容器,AI 可覆盖为其他像素值,铁律 3 禁 vh/百分比高。

uplink: 本条是本地对照交互,默认无需上行;若消费端要读取当前分割位置,直接读 slider.value 并自行按载体处理,不预设事件出口。

carriers.widget: supported:组件自带内部 shadow 样式,防 FOUC CSS 与宿主节点另落外层 shadowRoot;图片源须获宿主 CSP 许可
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + custom elements + ResizeObserver;远程图片源须可加载

isolation.evidence: 组件结构/样式在自带内部 shadow(name=first/second slot 佐证);外部 dist/styles.css(防 FOUC 的 [slot] 规则)由 boot 加载,非库向 head 注入。globalEvents=yes:onMouseDown 时 window.addEventListener('mousemove'/'mouseup'),onWindowMouseUp 内 removeEventListener 全部清理,另有 disconnectedCallback → 瞬时自清理(非泄漏)但运行时确实触碰 window;拖拽时还瞬时置 document.body.style.userSelect='none' 并在 mouseup 还原(非节点追加,故 globalDomMutation=no)。自注册+内部 shadow,append 进外层 shadowRoot 正常(carriers.widget=supported)。

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need a touch-enabled, keyboard-accessible before/after image comparison slider that scales with its container, instead of hand-writing one, because native implementations fail at synchronized clipping, pointer coordinates, and mobile gestures.
en.why_valuable: AI can only write a fragile range+clip-path demo by default; it cannot reliably handle resize, touch-direction detection, keyboard accessibility, and a synchronized split position. This component closes those state loops natively.

data_in.note: The two images enter the custom element through the first/second named slots. boot mounts them with JS createElement and does not write declarative custom-element tags.

before.src: string -- First image URL or data URL

after.src: string -- Second image URL or data URL

schema.hover?: boolean -- Follow pointer movement; default false

spec.note: Both images must share the same explicit pixel height to keep clipping geometry aligned. boot defaults to 360px with width following the container; AI may override it with another pixel value, and Rule 3 prohibits vh/percentage height.
